#5=0B
Tutorial - Passing variables
This tutorial shows you how to pass GET/POST variables to methods.
WelcomePagec
            <form action="greetUser" method="GET">
            What is your name?
            <input type="text" name="name" />
            <input type="submit" />
            </form>
selfr
H/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/cherrypy/tutorial/tut03_get_and_post.py
index
WelcomePage.indexNc
Hey %s, what's up?z-Please enter your name <a href="./">here</a>.z2No, really, enter your name <a href="./">here</a>.r

	greetUser
